# Test Project

> A test project for generation

## Api

- [API Overview](https://docs.example.com/api/overview): Overview of the API endpoints
- [API Endpoints](https://docs.example.com/api/endpoints): Detailed endpoint reference

## Concepts

- [Architecture](https://docs.example.com/concepts/architecture): System architecture overview
- [Security](https://docs.example.com/concepts/security): Security best practices

## General

- [Getting Started](https://docs.example.com/getting-started): Learn how to set up the project
- [Changelog](https://docs.example.com/changelog): - Initial release

## Guides

- [Tutorial](https://docs.example.com/guides/tutorial): Step-by-step tutorial
- [Advanced Usage](https://docs.example.com/guides/advanced): Advanced patterns and techniques
- [MDX Example](https://docs.example.com/guides/mdx-example): A page with MDX components

## Reference

- [Configuration Reference](https://docs.example.com/reference/config): All configuration options
- [CLI Reference](https://docs.example.com/reference/cli): Command-line interface reference
